title: CMake's verilate doesn't do anything with TRACE_STRUCTS
body:
As far as I have tested, if you have a CMakeLists.txt as such:
```cmake
verilate(test_foobar TRACE TRACE_STRUCTS
         SOURCES src/foobar.sv
)
```
The current `verilate` function doesn't won't call `verilator` with the `--trace-structs` option.
Also `verilator --build cmake` currently doesn't emit the `--trace-structs` option for CMake.
